case_title: LUCAS LLANSO PUENTE VS. LILA SALMERON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE AND REQUEST TO RESET COURT DATE; FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUENTE, LUCAS LLANSO
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-18-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-05-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LEVINE FILED BY PUENTE, LUCAS LLANSO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PUENTE, LUCAS LLANSO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALMERON, LILA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,200.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. DAMAGES PROVED AS REQUESTED WITH DISCOUNT TO RENTAL CAR FEE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO LILA SALMERON-15 COVERSIDE COURT, BUENA PARK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARNCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LEVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
